claim_boundary: This is one development-contaminated case and one unbalanced four-call block.
The case-program binding, recurrence, semantic roles, event, evidence values, operator order, and terminal surrogate target are explicit oracle inputs.
The provider receives allowlisted public transition controls after a stop-gradient JSON projection; GPT and its hidden states are not differentiated.
Provider randomness and run position are not separated from arm behavior.
Surrogate improvement, provider completion, strict final-output grade, token usage, and latency are reported as separate observations.
Frozen predecessor imports may hash the gold file for source integrity before calls, but semantic gold JSON is parsed and attached only after all four provider attempts.
A changed output or controlled-only strict pass is a canary observation, not evidence of a general quality advantage.
No reasoning-quality, efficiency, reliability, causality, production-readiness, or generalization claim is promotion-eligible from this run.
